element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls central triangle, pieces spawn from sides at moderate speed

element_introduction_order.element: Color-matching mechanic (shoot same color to clear)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic; chain clearing identical colors in rows/columns

element_introduction_order.element: Color-swap mechanic (shoot different color to exchange)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Strategic color arrangement; enables setup for chain clears
Game speeds up incrementally; pieces arrive more frequently
Clears 3×3 area; used for rapid piece elimination in crowded fields
Clears entire row/column; tactical tool for emergency clearing
Intentionally distracting; asymmetrical color schemes and intricate patterns increase cognitive load

typical_relief_triggers: Using bomb pieces to eliminate large groups
Resetting piece flow after quota achievement
Color swaps that unlock strategic arrangements
typical_tension_triggers: Spawn rate increases (every quota completion before level 10)
Opti-Challenge backgrounds making pieces harder to distinguish
Music becoming more tense and fast-paced in advanced levels
Unpredictable piece spawn pattern (never two consecutive from same quadrant)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Constant real-time pressure with incremental acceleration; tension escalates through quota-triggered spawn increases and background visual distraction; music evolution mirrors difficulty

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to matching and swapping mechanics at comfortable spawn rates; background complexity remains minimal
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Spawn rate escalates after quota completion; Opti-Challenge backgrounds introduce visual interference; special pieces (bombs) appear; cognitive load increases through color scheme complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced levels employ maximum visual distraction; intricate asymmetrical background patterns; music becomes tense; spawn timing accelerated; requires rapid decision-making under cognitive noise
notable_spikes: First quota completion (triggers level speed increase and background change)
Introduction of Opti-Challenge visual distraction (escalates throughout mid-game)
Level 10 transition (background changes cease but visual/audio intensity remains high)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level has a target piece-clear quota. Upon completion, game speed increases and background changes (before level 10). This creates rhythmic tension-relief cycles within levels.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Levels 1-9 (visible progression); Level 10+ (speed increases continue but background variants end)

notable_level_patterns.description: Backgrounds gradually shift from simple colors to contrasting, intricate, and asymmetrical patterns. Designed to distract player while maintaining piece visibility. Serves as difficulty curve independent of gameplay mechanics.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early levels (simple), mid-to-late levels (complex asymmetrical patterns)

notable_level_patterns.description: Two consecutive pieces never spawn from same quadrant; statistically, runs of identical colors are longer than random chance would suggest. Creates perceived predictability while maintaining tension.
